Candidates must verify all details on the admit card, carry valid identity proof, and follow the prescribed examination guidelines on the test day.

title: Delhi EV policy keeps hybrids out, includes 3-year lock-in period

Subsidies are also available for electric two and three-wheelers, aiming to significantly curb pollution and boost clean mobility.

Katie Miller is not impressed with Bezos' ex-wife MacKenzie Scott who donated billions
description: MacKenzie Scott's substantial charitable donations, totaling over $26 billion, have drawn criticism from figures like Katie Miller and Elon Musk. Miller specifically pointed to Scott's funding of progressive causes, including Planned Parenthood and racial justice groups.  Scott, who received a significant Amazon stake in her divorce, has pledged to donate the majority of her wealth, supporting diverse non-profits across education, healthcare, and climate initiatives.

Erling Haaland, Isabel Haugseng Johansen's combined net worth in 2026
description: Erling Haaland and Isabel Haugseng Johansen have built one of football's most talked-about partnerships. While Haaland's estimated $100 million net worth comes from his Manchester City contract, bonuses and endorsements, Johansen maintains a private lifestyle with an estimated net worth of $250,000-$300,000. The couple welcomed their first son in 2024 and continue to enjoy a family-focused life. Their combined wealth, luxury properties and growing global profile keep them among football's most prominent young couples.

title: Michael Dell on Dell's plan to move base to Texas, days after message from governor
description: Dell Technologies shareholders have overwhelmingly approved a move to shift the company's legal base from Delaware to Texas, its long-time home. CEO Michael Dell expressed pride in making the move official, highlighting Texas's role in the company's growth. This decision follows a trend of major corporations, including Tesla and Exxon Mobil, relocating to Texas, drawn by its business-friendly environment and talent pool.
